_comment: Example system-level fitness composite - shows how dimension scores aggregate into a single architectural health assessment

tradeoff_analysis.insight: Maintainability improved (+0.03) likely due to complexity refactoring, but modularity regressed (-0.05) - new dependencies added between modules. Security remains the weakest dimension at 0.60. Net system score declined by 0.03.
recommendations: Investigate MD01 regression - check coupling changes in recent commits
SC01 at 0.60 is below healthy threshold - prioritize dependency vulnerability resolution
MT01 improvement validates recent refactoring effort
